knowledge_need: Study topic as Engineer-Philosopher. Attempt 1 of up to 3. Give compact Builder-relevant understanding, validation needs, and return plan.

part_digests.name: core meaning
part_digests.meaning: A minimal reusable builder learning rule is the smallest validated pattern that can change future Builder behavior across similar cases without carrying full episode history.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Defines X as behavior abstraction: trigger, action, constraint, expected delta, and validation evidence.
compact_missing_knowledge: Exact local format for accepted atom or rule candidates
Which Builder surface is allowed to store/use the rule
compact_safe_learning_steps: Compare one successful and one failed case without modifying state
Extract only the invariant decision rule
Keep source as draft until validated
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Show the rule predicts a better next action on a held-out similar case
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Return X as a compact rule candidate, not as a narrative memory.

part_digests.name: why I am not ideal
part_digests.meaning: The weakness revealed is over-absorbing context, mistaking explanation for reusable learning, or promoting unvalidated insight into active behavior.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Prevents X from becoming vague self-modeling or route authority instead of a bounded reusable learning rule.
compact_missing_knowledge: Which failure mode is most common in current Builder runs
Whether prior atoms overfit to single incidents
compact_safe_learning_steps: Name the specific weakness before proposing a rule
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: A reviewer or validator can distinguish evidence from the proposed rule
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Use X2 as a guardrail: minimal rule must correct a real weakness, not decorate the memory system.

part_digests.name: builder relevance
part_digests.meaning: Builder relevance is the rule's ability to improve self-build or child-agent build decisions through smaller context, safer reuse, and measurable behavior change.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Connects X to practical Builder work: route choice, repair choice, validation choice, and agent instruction reuse.
compact_missing_knowledge: Which Builder workflow will first consume the rule
Whether reuse applies to self-build, child-agent build, or both
compact_safe_learning_steps: Bind the rule to one concrete workflow first
Avoid claiming runtime capability from conceptual relevance
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Demonstrate one future decision uses the rule and differs from the previous baseline
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Promote only if the rule reduces repeated reasoning or prevents repeated error in Builder behavior.

part_digests.name: validation
part_digests.meaning: Validation means proving the extracted rule improves future behavior under controlled conditions, not merely sounding coherent.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Defines the acceptance boundary for X and blocks premature promotion.
compact_missing_knowledge: Required validator path for this exact rule type
compact_safe_learning_steps: Use a small held-out scenario before any active route wiring
Keep failed validation as learning input, not accepted memory
compact_validation_needed: Storage/retrieval/use evidence if promotion is considered
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: X can return as atom candidate only after validation shows reusable behavior delta.

part_digests.name: promotion decision
part_digests.meaning: Promotion classifies the output as case pattern, atom candidate, or open gap based on evidence strength and reuse clarity.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Prevents X from forcing every insight into accepted memory and keeps learning proportional to proof.
compact_missing_knowledge: Current allowed storage surface for draft candidates
compact_safe_learning_steps: Default to case pattern when evidence is thin
Use atom candidate only when trigger/action/validation are explicit
Mark open gap when missing evidence blocks reuse
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Promotion rationale is auditable against evidence and thresholds
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Likely return for attempt 1 is atom candidate only if a testable minimal rule is produced; otherwise case pattern or open gap.

dependencies: X2 depends on X1 because weakness can only be judged against the intended rule shape
X3 depends on X1 because relevance requires a concrete reusable behavior
X5 depends on X4 because promotion requires validation evidence
duplicates_or_overlaps: X4 overlaps X5: validation supplies the evidence used for promotion
X2 overlaps X4: both prevent unvalidated self-belief from becoming active behavior
can_skip_for_now: None; X5 can stay provisional if validation thresholds are unavailable

parent_return_plan.how_to_rebuild_x: Define one minimal trigger-action-constraint-expectation rule, name the weakness it addresses, bind it to one Builder workflow, then require held-out behavior-delta validation before any promotion.
parent_return_plan.next_small_action: Draft a single candidate rule in trigger/action/expected-delta form and test it against one prior similar case without modifying active state.
proof_needed: Held-out scenario behavior improves or avoids a known failure
Evidence separates source case from reusable rule
Promotion decision is justified as case pattern, atom candidate, or open gap

promotion_decision.owner_decision_required: only if promotion beyond case pattern is requested
promotion_decision.reason: Batch source answer is material only; default is compact case pattern with part map and parent return plan.
